expectations: The response explicitly freezes all fix attempts before doing anything else
The response classifies the problem domain (VPS, database, frontend, auth, etc.)
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent via TeamCreate
cases.notes: Bare invocation — must freeze, classify, AND dispatch. Never tries another fix.

cases.query: you're going in circles, troubleshoot this
expectations: The response stops the current approach immediately (freezes)
The response does NOT propose another variation of the previous fix
The response identifies the problem domain and reads the corresponding reference file
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent
cases.notes: Frustration trigger — circuit-breaker must stop the fix spiral, not continue it

expectations: The response freezes current approach rather than immediately proposing another fix
The response gathers evidence before proposing a fix
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent with the problem context
cases.notes: Evidence-first trigger — must gather before proposing

expectations: The response acknowledges it is stuck and freezes
The response classifies which domain(s) the issue touches
The response reads the relevant reference file from references/ directory
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent via TeamCreate (visible tmux pane)
cases.notes: Manual trigger phrase — full 4-step protocol: freeze, classify, read refs, dispatch

cases.query: this still isn't working after your last two fixes
expectations: The response recognizes this as 2+ consecutive failed attempts and auto-triggers
The response freezes before attempting anything else
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent that verifies assumptions, not tries more fixes
cases.notes: Auto-trigger scenario — 2 consecutive failures must fire the skill automatically

expectations: The response invokes the troubleshoot skill
The response freezes and classifies the domain
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent before attempting any fix

cases.query: the Traefik routing still isn't working after fixing the labels twice
expectations: The response freezes fix attempts
The response classifies as VPS/Docker/Traefik domain and reads references/vps-docker.md
The response dispatches a diagnostic agent that runs whichcontainer to verify target
The diagnostic agent prompt includes Phase 1 target verification steps
cases.notes: Domain-specific trigger — VPS/Docker domain should load correct reference file

cases.query: fix this CSS bug in the dashboard
expectations: The response attempts to fix the CSS bug directly
The response does NOT freeze all activity as a first step
The response does NOT dispatch a diagnostic agent for a first-time fix request
cases.notes: First fix attempt — troubleshoot only fires after 2 consecutive failures, not on first try

expectations: The response begins implementation work
The response does NOT classify problem domains or read diagnostic reference files
cases.notes: Implementation request — not a fix-loop situation

cases.query: how does the signal engine work
expectations: The response explains the signal engine
The response does NOT invoke troubleshoot protocol
cases.notes: Informational question — no failure loop, no troubleshoot needed
